productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Printed Navy Blue Tshirt
description: Composition Navy blue round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, contrasting ribbed neckline and cuffs, and has distressed graphic print and applique work on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Machine wash or hand wash cold using a mild detergent Do not wring, bleach, or iron on print Flat dry in shade Ramp up your style quotient with this stylish T-shirt from US Polo. The graphic print on the front pays tribute to classic fashion, while the cotton fabric offers exemplary comfort. Pair it with denims and canvas shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6'1" and shoulders 18.5"
